why: Provisional balanced local default for limited hardware until stronger evidence says otherwise.
Faster/lighter local fallback when latency or hardware pressure matters more than deeper reasoning.
Lightest local lane for the tightest memory and throughput conditions.
Deeper local reasoning step-up only after the approved model is installed and benchmarked on this machine.
Heavy local quality lane kept registered for revisit, but currently excluded on this machine until the empty-response behavior is resolved.
Heavier uncapped-quality local candidate kept registered for revisit, but currently excluded on this machine until the empty-response behavior is resolved.
Heaviest q4 local reasoning lane kept registered for revisit, but currently excluded on this machine until the empty-response behavior is resolved.
Registered for manual or evidence-backed opt-in only, and currently excluded on this machine until the empty-response behavior is resolved.
Registered for manual or evidence-backed opt-in only, and currently excluded on this machine until the empty-response behavior is resolved.
